subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book, sent down in truth, which God hath made as a testimony from His presence and a manifestation from His realm unto those who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب نزلت بالحق و جعلها الله دلیلا من عنده ثم ظهورا من لدنه علی من
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
